description: Analyze the EEG recording OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt in ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/ to identify the first eye blink artifact. Eye blinks are characterized by large, rounded deflections primarily in Channels 1 and 2 (Fp1/Fp2). Determine the timestamp in seconds where this first blink reaches its peak and save the numerical value to /home/ga/blink_timestamp.txt.
